# minimumTolerance

**Instance Property**

The minimum tolerance allowed by the scheduler.

## Declaration

```swift
var minimumTolerance: Self.SchedulerTimeType.Stride { get }
```

## Accessing scheduler time properties

- **now**: This scheduler’s definition of the current moment in time.
